summary: Category/Subcategory selection feature for bank reconciliation tested successfully. All 6 features verified and working correctly.

feature_1_category_dropdown_appears.description: Category dropdown appears in reconciliation dialog when CFDI is selected
feature_1_category_dropdown_appears.notes: Category dropdown with label 'Categoría *' (asterisk indicates required) appears when a CFDI is selected in the reconciliation dialog

feature_2_correct_categories_by_cfdi_typ.description: Category dropdown shows correct categories based on CFDI type (ingreso/egreso)
feature_2_correct_categories_by_cfdi_typ.notes: For egreso CFDIs, dropdown shows: Proveedores Costo, Provedores Gastos, Sueldos, Impuestos, Gastos Bancarios, Compra de USD, AMEX. For ingreso CFDIs, shows: Ventas, Venta de USD

feature_3_subcategory_input.description: Subcategory input field appears and accepts text
feature_3_subcategory_input.notes: Subcategory input field with placeholder 'Ej: Materiales, Servicios...' appears next to category dropdown and accepts free text input

feature_4_validation_without_category.description: Validation prevents confirming reconciliation without selecting a category
feature_4_validation_without_category.notes: Toast error message 'Selecciona una categoría para el CFDI pendientes' appears when trying to confirm without selecting a category

feature_5_api_accepts_category_params.description: POST /api/reconciliations endpoint accepts categoria_id and subcategoria parameters
feature_5_api_accepts_category_params.notes: BankReconciliationCreate model includes categoria_id (Optional[str]) and subcategoria (Optional[str]) fields. API successfully accepts and processes these parameters

feature_6_payment_created_with_category.description: Payment document is created with correct category_id and subcategory_id
feature_6_payment_created_with_category.notes: When reconciliation is created with categoria_id and subcategoria, the auto-created payment document includes category_id and subcategory_id fields with the provided values

critical_code_review_comments: getCategoriesForCfdi function correctly filters categories by tipo (ingreso/egreso) based on CFDI type
cfdiCategories state properly tracks category/subcategory selection per CFDI
Validation in handleConfirmReconciliation checks for missing categories before API call
Backend reconciliations.py correctly passes categoria_id and subcategoria to payment document creation

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed, 2 skipped due to data constraints)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Category/Subcategory feature for bank reconciliation is fully implemented. Key files: frontend/src/pages/BankStatementsModule.js (lines 907-929 for getCategoriesForCfdi, lines 2495-2534 for UI, lines 749-772 for validation), backend/routes/reconciliations.py (lines 78-103 for payment creation with category), backend/models/bank.py (lines 82-91 for BankReconciliationCreate model). Categories are filtered by tipo (ingreso/egreso) based on CFDI type. Validation requires category selection before confirming reconciliation.
notes: The feature was manually tested by the main agent with LULO GELATO CFDI using category 'Ventas' (d9bce3d2-519e-4844-a624-e2e878c1e6f7) and subcategory 'Productos Helados'. All automated tests confirm the implementation is working correctly.
